PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, SALVADOR A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, LUIS F. $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF SALVADOR A. DIAZ RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, SALVADOR A.
